# BRAULIO FLORES

**Senior Full Stack Developer & Tech Lead**

[correo@outlook.com](mailto:correo@outlook.com) &#183; [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/PROFILE) &#183; [GitHub](https://github.com/GITHUB) &#183; [SITEDEV.COM](https://SITEDEV.COM)

---

I architect and ship high-traffic web applications in finance and government. Right now I lead engineering at **BBVA**, building systems that serve millions of users across Latin America.

I like clean APIs, teams that do real code reviews, and deploying on Friday because the pipeline actually works.

---

### Stack

```
Frontend    React · Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Shadcn/UI
Backend     Node.js · Express · Spring Boot (Java 17/21) · Prisma
Data        PostgreSQL · Redis · schema design
Infra       Docker · GitHub Actions · Jenkins · Vercel · Railway
```

---

### How I think about software

**Keep it boring where it counts.** The best architecture is the one your team can debug at 2am.

**Standards beat heroics.** A consistent codebase outlasts any clever abstraction.

**Ship it, then measure.** Every architecture doc is a hypothesis until production proves it right.

---

<sub>I work async and remote. Drop me a line anytime.</sub>
